title: Dependencies column
excerpt:

posts.author: srasul (Sam)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m getting the following message on my board: Dependencies automation deprecation. This board is using a deprecated version of dependencies automations, please upgrade.

When I click upgrade, nothing happens. Please advise. Thanks

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Sam,

If you simply create a new dependency column it should include our updated dependency capabilities and features.

Let me know how you go
